subject: Hi from Diana Bogdanova!
body:
Hi Jeffrey,
This is Diana. I hope i find you in a good place and happy.
I've been thinking about you all this years. I stay in touch with Cecilia.
I was in Europe for a wile and then Los Angeles.
I will be in NYC April 1st for a week and would love love to
stop by and say Hi to you. Hopefully you will be there.
I trust all is well...

Always love....

Diana

917-806-9557
dianabogdanova@gmail.com
